artifacts.title: Example HR - consolidate HR stack
artifacts.raw_text: Stop juggling five HR tools. Example HR runs onboarding, payroll, and benefits from one dashboard. See why teams switch.

artifacts.title: Example HR - fast onboarding
artifacts.raw_text: Onboard your first hire in under 10 minutes. Example HR automates offer letters, devices, and payroll setup.
